description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Train service enhancement during Christmas  New Year
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 聖誕新年期間加強服務

2024-12-18T19:15:00.CONTENT_EN:
MTR have added extra train trips and adjusted servicehours during Christmas and New Year as follows:

Christmas Eve (24 December)
· Alllocal lines and 7 Light Rail routes will operate overnight (except for Airport Express, Disneyland Resort Line and journeys to or from Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau stations on the East Rail Line)
· Servicehours will be extended on 3 bus routes (506, K51 and K54)


New Year's Eve (31 December)​
· Alllocal lines and 7 Light Rail routes will operate overnight (except for Airport Express, Disneyland Resort Line and journeys to or from Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau stations on the East Rail Line)
· DisneylandResort Line service hours will be extended
· Servicehours will be extended on 3 bus routes (506, K51 and K54)

There will be a total of 2,200 extra train trips between 20 December and 1 January. The Island Line and South Island Line will operate at an increased frequency of approximately 3-4 minutes most of the time during the weekends and holidays. The Airport Express will provide addition early and late train trips as follows:
· 25 December and 1 January: the first train will depart from Hong Kong Station at 5:30am
· 29 December and 1 January: the last train will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00am the next day

Please refer to MTR's website for more information. 

Crowd management measures may be implemented instations. Please refer to the latest service updates.
2024-12-18T19:15:00.CONTENT_CN:
港鐵於聖誕及新年期間服務安排如下：

平安夜（12月24日）​
·本地鐵路綫及7條輕鐵路綫通宵行駛（不包括機場快綫、迪士尼綫及東鐵綫往返羅湖及落馬洲站）
·3條巴士綫（506、K51及K54）延長服務時間


除夕夜（12月31日）​
·本地鐵路綫及7條輕鐵路綫通宵行駛（不包括機場快綫、迪士尼綫及東鐵綫往返羅湖及落馬洲站）
·迪士尼綫延長服務時間
·3條巴士綫（506、K51及K54）延長服務時間

此外，12月20日至1月1日期間，部份本地鐵路綫於不同時段加密列車班次，總共增加2200班列車，其中港島綫及南港島綫於周末及假日大部份時間將加密至約3至4分鐘一班車。而機場快綫會作出以下特別安排，方便出行旅客：
·12月25日及1月1日：香港站頭班車提前於早上05:30開出
·12月29日及1月1日：博覽館站尾班車延至翌日凌晨01:00開出

詳情請參考港鐵網頁。

部分車站在人多時或會實施客流管理措施，請留意最新車務資訊。

description.LOCATION_EN: Tseung Kwan O Line Service Disruption

2024-12-20T18:36:00.CONTENT_EN: Train service near Po Lam Station on the Tseung Kwan O Line has been suspended. Please consider using other transport.
2024-12-20T18:36:00.CONTENT_CN: 將軍澳綫寶琳站附近的列車服務暫停，請考慮使用其他交通工具。

2024-12-20T18:47:00.CONTENT_EN:
Train service of Tseung Kwan O Line is as follows. 
For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm.  A free MTR shuttle bus service is being arranged and should be operating at affected station(s) around 45 minutes after the rail service suspension, depending on road traffic conditions as it will take time to organize. Please consider using other transport.
2024-12-20T18:47:00.CONTENT_CN:
將軍澳綫服務更改如下：
詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm。  港鐵免費接駁巴士將於稍後時間到達。鑑於調配車輛需時，並需視乎當時路面情況，港鐵會致力在列車服務局部中斷後約45分鐘於受影響車站為大家提供接駁巴士服務,請考慮使用其他交通工具。

2024-12-20T18:56:00.CONTENT_EN: The urgent inspection on tracks at platform in Po Lam Station is completed. Normal train service is gradually resuming on the Tseung Kwan O Line.
2024-12-20T18:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 寶琳站月台路軌的緊急檢查已經完成，將軍澳綫列車服務逐步回復正常。
